title: Faculty of Health Sciences Petitions
content:
Faculty of Health Sciences Petitions

ANNOUNCEMENT ABOUT THE PETITION SYSTEM.

"Dear students, as the Dean's Office of the Faculty of Health Sciences, we would like to make an important announcement. Our Dean's Office has now switched to a system where you can easily and quickly submit your petitions. Thanks to this system, you will be able to submit all your petitions from your personal petitions, exemption request petitions, single course petitions, excuse exam petitions to the petition system at the link below as of 20.05.2024. In this way, the processing of your petitions will be faster and easier. Thanks to this system, we aim to save your time and energy. We wish you a healthy and successful education life and wish you a good transition to the petition system. The link is shared below, please be informed about this change. Have a good day."

Link:

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/
